description.overview: The tallest of all dog breeds, Irish Wolfhounds are gentle giants with patient, dignified personalities. Despite their size, they're calm house dogs.
description.history: The Irish Wolfhound originated in Ireland.
description.temperament: Known for being courageous, dignified, calm.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, wiry coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The tallest of all dog breeds, Irish Wolfhounds are gentle giants with patient, dignified personalities. Despite their size, they're calm house dogs.
